testcase.name: Valid booking request returns 202 Accepted
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "202"...............................passed And the response body should contain field "bookingId"......................passed And the response body should contain field "status" with value "PENDING"....passed

testcase.name: Booking request is forwarded to booking.requested queue
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "202"...............................passed And an event should be published to the "booking.requested" queue...........passed

testcase.name: Missing classroomId returns 400 Bad Request
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "400"...............................passed And the response body should contain field "error"..........................passed

testcase.name: Missing date returns 400 Bad Request
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "400"...............................passed

testcase.name: Missing requestedBy returns 400 Bad Request
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "400"...............................passed

testcase.name: Invalid date format returns 400 Bad Request
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "400"...............................passed

testcase.name: End time before start time returns 400 Bad Request
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "400"...............................passed And the response body should contain "endTime must be after startTime"......passed

testcase.name: Empty request body returns 400 Bad Request
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with an empty body................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "400"...............................passed

testcase.name: Request with non-JSON content type returns 415 Unsupported Media Type
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with content type "text/plain" and body "classroomId=CR-101".passed Then the HTTP response status should be "415"...............................passed

testcase.name: Camel route logs incoming booking request
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the Camel route log should contain "Received booking request for classroom CR-103".passed

testcase.name: Health endpoint returns 200 OK
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings" is available..............................passed When I send a GET request to "/actuator/health".............................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "200"...............................passed And the response body should contain field "status" with value "UP".........passed

testcase.classname: Audit Logging - Booking Audit Trail via MongoDB
testcase.name: Booking creation produces a CREATED audit event
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the audit service is running on port "8084".............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "202"...............................passed And the response body should contain field "bookingId"......................passed When I query the audit trail for the last booking...........................passed Then the audit trail should contain an event with action "CREATED"..........passed And the audit event should have source "api-gateway"........................passed And the audit event payload should contain "CR-AUDIT-101"...................passed

testcase.classname: Audit Logging - Booking Audit Trail via MongoDB
testcase.name: Audit trail returns events in chronological order
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the audit service is running on port "8084".............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "202"...............................passed When I query the audit trail for the last booking...........................passed Then the audit trail should have at least 1 event...........................passed And the first audit event should have action "CREATED"......................passed

testcase.classname: Audit Logging - Booking Audit Trail via MongoDB
testcase.name: Audit endpoint returns 404 for unknown booking ID
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the audit service is running on port "8084".............................passed When I query the audit trail for booking "BK-NONEXISTENT"...................passed Then the audit HTTP response status should be "404".........................passed

testcase.classname: Audit Logging - Booking Audit Trail via MongoDB
testcase.name: Audit events can be queried by classroom ID
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the audit service is running on port "8084".............................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:........................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "202"...............................passed When I query audit events for classroom "CR-AUDIT-200"......................passed Then the classroom audit trail should not be empty..........................passed

testcase.name: Classroom is available when no bookings exist
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-01" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed Then the availability status should be "AVAILABLE"..........................passed

testcase.name: Classroom is unavailable for an exact duplicate slot
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given a booking already exists for classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-01" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-01" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed Then the availability status should be "UNAVAILABLE"........................passed And the conflict details should include the existing booking time "09:00 - 10:00".passed

testcase.name: Classroom is unavailable when new slot overlaps start of existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given a booking already exists for classroom "CR-102" on "2026-06-02" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-102" on "2026-06-02" from "09:30" to "10:30".passed Then the availability status should be "UNAVAILABLE"........................passed

testcase.name: Classroom is unavailable when new slot overlaps end of existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given a booking already exists for classroom "CR-103" on "2026-06-03" from "14:00" to "15:00".passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-103" on "2026-06-03" from "14:30" to "15:30".passed Then the availability status should be "UNAVAILABLE"........................passed

testcase.name: Classroom is unavailable when new slot is contained within existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given a booking already exists for classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-04" from "08:00" to "12:00".passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-04" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed Then the availability status should be "UNAVAILABLE"........................passed

testcase.name: Classroom is unavailable when new slot completely wraps an existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given a booking already exists for classroom "CR-102" on "2026-06-05" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-102" on "2026-06-05" from "09:00" to "12:00".passed Then the availability status should be "UNAVAILABLE"........................passed

testcase.name: Classroom is available when new slot starts exactly at end of existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given a booking already exists for classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-06" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-06" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed Then the availability status should be "AVAILABLE"..........................passed

testcase.name: Classroom is available when new slot ends exactly at start of existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given a booking already exists for classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-07" from "11:00" to "12:00".passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-07" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed Then the availability status should be "AVAILABLE"..........................passed

testcase.name: Classroom is available in a free gap between two existing bookings
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given the following bookings exist for classroom "CR-103":..................passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-103" on "2026-06-08" from "09:00" to "11:00".passed Then the availability status should be "AVAILABLE"..........................passed

testcase.name: Classroom is unavailable when slot conflicts with one of many existing bookings
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given the following bookings exist for classroom "CR-103":..................passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-103" on "2026-06-09" from "10:30" to "11:30".passed Then the availability status should be "UNAVAILABLE"........................passed

testcase.name: Booking on a different date does not affect availability on another date
testcase.system-out: Given the availability service is running...................................passed And the in-memory booking store is empty....................................passed Given a booking already exists for classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-10" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed When the availability service checks classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-11" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed Then the availability status should be "AVAILABLE"..........................passed

testcase.classname: Batch Booking - Split and Aggregate Pattern
testcase.name: Batch of 3 valid bookings returns array of 3 acceptances
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings/batch" is available........................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings/batch" with body:..................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "200"...............................passed And the response body should be a JSON array of size 3......................passed And each item in the batch response should contain field "bookingId"........passed

testcase.classname: Batch Booking - Split and Aggregate Pattern
testcase.name: Batch with one invalid booking returns mixed results
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings/batch" is available........................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings/batch" with body:..................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "200"...............................passed And the response body should be a JSON array of size 2......................passed And the batch response should contain at least one error item...............passed

testcase.classname: Batch Booking - Split and Aggregate Pattern
testcase.name: Batch with single item works like single booking
testcase.system-out: Given the API gateway is running on port "8080".............................passed And the endpoint "POST /bookings/batch" is available........................passed When I send a POST request to "/bookings/batch" with body:..................passed Then the HTTP response status should be "200"...............................passed And the response body should be a JSON array of size 1......................passed And each item in the batch response should contain field "bookingId"........passed

testcase.name: Successful booking when classroom is available
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-101" is available on "2026-06-01" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed When user "alice@example.com" books classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-01" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed Then the booking status should be "CONFIRMED"...............................passed And a confirmation notification should be sent to "alice@example.com".......passed And the event "booking.confirmed" should be published to RabbitMQ...........passed

testcase.name: Successful booking for a different time slot on the same day
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-102" has an existing booking on "2026-06-02" from "08:00" to "09:00".passed And classroom "CR-102" is available on "2026-06-02" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed When user "bob@example.com" books classroom "CR-102" on "2026-06-02" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed Then the booking status should be "CONFIRMED"...............................passed And a confirmation notification should be sent to "bob@example.com".........passed

testcase.name: Successful booking for a different classroom at the same time
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-101" has an existing booking on "2026-06-03" from "14:00" to "15:00".passed And classroom "CR-102" is available on "2026-06-03" from "14:00" to "15:00".passed When user "carol@example.com" books classroom "CR-102" on "2026-06-03" from "14:00" to "15:00".passed Then the booking status should be "CONFIRMED"...............................passed And a confirmation notification should be sent to "carol@example.com".......passed

testcase.name: Booking rejected when classroom is already booked at the exact same time
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-101" has an existing booking on "2026-06-04" from "11:00" to "12:00".passed When user "dave@example.com" tries to book classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-04" from "11:00" to "12:00".passed Then the booking status should be "REJECTED"................................passed And the rejection reason should be "Time slot is already booked"............passed And a rejection notification should be sent to "dave@example.com"...........passed And the event "booking.rejected" should be published to RabbitMQ............passed

testcase.name: Booking rejected when requested time overlaps the start of an existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-102" has an existing booking on "2026-06-05" from "13:00" to "14:00".passed When user "eve@example.com" tries to book classroom "CR-102" on "2026-06-05" from "12:30" to "13:30".passed Then the booking status should be "REJECTED"................................passed And the rejection reason should be "Time slot is already booked"............passed

testcase.name: Booking rejected when requested time overlaps the end of an existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-103" has an existing booking on "2026-06-06" from "15:00" to "16:00".passed When user "frank@example.com" tries to book classroom "CR-103" on "2026-06-06" from "15:30" to "16:30".passed Then the booking status should be "REJECTED"................................passed And the rejection reason should be "Time slot is already booked"............passed

testcase.name: Booking rejected when requested time is completely within an existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-101" has an existing booking on "2026-06-07" from "09:00" to "12:00".passed When user "grace@example.com" tries to book classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-07" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed Then the booking status should be "REJECTED"................................passed And the rejection reason should be "Time slot is already booked"............passed

testcase.name: Booking rejected when requested time completely encompasses an existing booking
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-102" has an existing booking on "2026-06-08" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed When user "henry@example.com" tries to book classroom "CR-102" on "2026-06-08" from "09:00" to "12:00".passed Then the booking status should be "REJECTED"................................passed And the rejection reason should be "Time slot is already booked"............passed

testcase.name: Booking allowed when new slot starts exactly when previous booking ends
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-101" has an existing booking on "2026-06-09" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed When user "iris@example.com" books classroom "CR-101" on "2026-06-09" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed Then the booking status should be "CONFIRMED"...............................passed

testcase.name: Booking allowed when new slot ends exactly when next booking starts
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-102" has an existing booking on "2026-06-10" from "11:00" to "12:00".passed When user "jack@example.com" books classroom "CR-102" on "2026-06-10" from "10:00" to "11:00".passed Then the booking status should be "CONFIRMED"...............................passed

testcase.name: Booking outcome depends on classroom availability - #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-101" availability status is "AVAILABLE" on "2026-07-01" from "08:00" to "09:00".passed When user "user1@example.com" requests to book classroom "CR-101" on "2026-07-01" from "08:00" to "09:00".passed Then the booking status should be "CONFIRMED"...............................passed

testcase.name: Booking outcome depends on classroom availability - #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-102" availability status is "UNAVAILABLE" on "2026-07-01" from "08:00" to "09:00".passed When user "user2@example.com" requests to book classroom "CR-102" on "2026-07-01" from "08:00" to "09:00".passed Then the booking status should be "REJECTED"................................passed

testcase.name: Booking outcome depends on classroom availability - #1.3
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-103" availability status is "AVAILABLE" on "2026-07-02" from "13:00" to "14:00".passed When user "user3@example.com" requests to book classroom "CR-103" on "2026-07-02" from "13:00" to "14:00".passed Then the booking status should be "CONFIRMED"...............................passed

testcase.name: Booking outcome depends on classroom availability - #1.4
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-101" availability status is "UNAVAILABLE" on "2026-07-03" from "16:00" to "17:00".passed When user "user4@example.com" requests to book classroom "CR-101" on "2026-07-03" from "16:00" to "17:00".passed Then the booking status should be "REJECTED"................................passed

testcase.name: Booking outcome depends on classroom availability - #1.5
testcase.system-out: Given the booking system is up and running..................................passed And the following classrooms exist:.........................................passed Given classroom "CR-102" availability status is "AVAILABLE" on "2026-07-04" from "09:00" to "10:30".passed When user "user5@example.com" requests to book classroom "CR-102" on "2026-07-04" from "09:00" to "10:30".passed Then the booking status should be "CONFIRMED"...............................passed

testcase.name: Complete flow - API to notification for a confirmed booking
testcase.system-out: Given the complete system is running with all services:.....................passed And RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"..........................passed And the booking store is empty..............................................passed Given classroom "CR-101" is available on "2026-08-01" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed When I submit a booking request via the REST API:...........................passed Then the API should respond with status "202" and a bookingId...............passed And eventually the booking status should become "CONFIRMED".................passed And a confirmation notification should be logged for "alice@example.com"....passed And all RabbitMQ queues should be empty after processing....................passed

testcase.name: Complete flow - API to notification for a rejected booking
testcase.system-out: Given the complete system is running with all services:.....................passed And RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"..........................passed And the booking store is empty..............................................passed Given classroom "CR-102" has an existing booking on "2026-08-02" from "11:00" to "12:00".passed When I submit a booking request via the REST API:...........................passed Then the API should respond with status "202" and a bookingId...............passed And eventually the booking status should become "REJECTED"..................passed And a rejection notification should be logged for "bob@example.com".........passed And all RabbitMQ queues should be empty after processing....................passed

testcase.name: Two simultaneous requests for the same slot - only one is confirmed
testcase.system-out: Given the complete system is running with all services:.....................passed And RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"..........................passed And the booking store is empty..............................................passed Given classroom "CR-103" is available on "2026-08-03" from "14:00" to "15:00".passed When the following booking requests are submitted concurrently:.............passed Then exactly "1" booking should be confirmed................................passed And exactly "1" booking should be rejected..................................passed And total notifications sent should be "2"..................................passed

testcase.name: Multiple bookings for different classrooms on the same day all succeed
testcase.system-out: Given the complete system is running with all services:.....................passed And RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"..........................passed And the booking store is empty..............................................passed When the following booking requests are submitted in sequence:..............passed Then all "3" bookings should be confirmed...................................passed And "3" confirmation notifications should have been sent....................passed

testcase.name: Booking the same classroom sequentially in non-overlapping slots all succeed
testcase.system-out: Given the complete system is running with all services:.....................passed And RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"..........................passed And the booking store is empty..............................................passed When the following booking requests are submitted in sequence:..............passed Then all "3" bookings should be confirmed...................................passed

testcase.name: Booking request is not lost when availability service is temporarily slow
testcase.system-out: Given the complete system is running with all services:.....................passed And RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"..........................passed And the booking store is empty..............................................passed Given the availability service introduces a delay of "2" seconds............passed When I submit a booking request via the REST API:...........................passed Then the API should respond with status "202" and a bookingId...............passed And eventually within "10" seconds the booking status should become "CONFIRMED".passed

testcase.name: Booking service publishes event to booking.requested queue
testcase.system-out: Given RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"........................passed And the following queues are declared:......................................passed And all queues are empty....................................................passed When a booking request is submitted:........................................passed Then an event should be present on the "booking.requested" queue............passed And the event payload should contain classroomId "CR-101"...................passed And the event payload should contain requestedBy "alice@example.com"........passed

testcase.name: Availability service consumes event from booking.requested queue
testcase.system-out: Given RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"........................passed And the following queues are declared:......................................passed And all queues are empty....................................................passed Given an event is on the "booking.requested" queue with payload:............passed And classroom "CR-102" is available at that time............................passed When the availability service consumes the event............................passed Then the "booking.requested" queue should be empty..........................passed And an event should be present on the "booking.confirmed" queue.............passed

testcase.name: Confirmed event is published to booking.confirmed queue when slot is free
testcase.system-out: Given RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"........................passed And the following queues are declared:......................................passed And all queues are empty....................................................passed Given an event is on the "booking.requested" queue with payload:............passed And classroom "CR-103" is available at that time............................passed When the availability service processes the event...........................passed Then an event should be present on the "booking.confirmed" queue............passed And the "booking.rejected" queue should be empty............................passed

testcase.name: Notification service consumes event from booking.confirmed queue
testcase.system-out: Given RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"........................passed And the following queues are declared:......................................passed And all queues are empty....................................................passed Given an event is on the "booking.confirmed" queue for "dave@example.com"...passed When the notification service consumes the event............................passed Then the "booking.confirmed" queue should be empty..........................passed And a confirmation notification should be logged for "dave@example.com".....passed

testcase.name: Rejected event is published to booking.rejected queue when slot is taken
testcase.system-out: Given RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"........................passed And the following queues are declared:......................................passed And all queues are empty....................................................passed Given an event is on the "booking.requested" queue with payload:............passed And classroom "CR-101" already has a booking on "2026-06-04" from "11:00" to "12:00".passed When the availability service processes the event...........................passed Then an event should be present on the "booking.rejected" queue.............passed And the "booking.confirmed" queue should be empty...........................passed

testcase.name: Notification service consumes event from booking.rejected queue
testcase.system-out: Given RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"........................passed And the following queues are declared:......................................passed And all queues are empty....................................................passed Given an event is on the "booking.rejected" queue for "frank@example.com" with reason "Time slot is already booked".passed When the notification service consumes the event............................passed Then the "booking.rejected" queue should be empty...........................passed And a rejection notification should be logged for "frank@example.com".......passed

testcase.name: Full end-to-end flow for a successful booking
testcase.system-out: Given RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"........................passed And the following queues are declared:......................................passed And all queues are empty....................................................passed Given classroom "CR-102" is available on "2026-06-05" from "15:00" to "16:00".passed When a booking request is submitted:........................................passed Then an event should be present on the "booking.requested" queue............passed When the availability service processes the event from "booking.requested"..passed Then an event should be present on the "booking.confirmed" queue............passed When the notification service processes the event from "booking.confirmed"..passed Then a confirmation notification should be logged for "grace@example.com"...passed And all queues should be empty..............................................passed

testcase.name: Full end-to-end flow for a rejected booking
testcase.system-out: Given RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"........................passed And the following queues are declared:......................................passed And all queues are empty....................................................passed Given classroom "CR-101" has an existing booking on "2026-06-06" from "09:00" to "10:00".passed When a booking request is submitted:........................................passed Then an event should be present on the "booking.requested" queue............passed When the availability service processes the event from "booking.requested"..passed Then an event should be present on the "booking.rejected" queue.............passed When the notification service processes the event from "booking.rejected"...passed Then a rejection notification should be logged for "henry@example.com"......passed And all queues should be empty..............................................passed

testcase.name: Message payload uses JSON format
testcase.system-out: Given RabbitMQ is running on "localhost" port "5672"........................passed And the following queues are declared:......................................passed And all queues are empty....................................................passed When a booking request is submitted:........................................passed Then the message on "booking.requested" queue should be valid JSON..........passed And the JSON payload should have field "classroomId" equal to "CR-103"......passed And the JSON payload should have field "requestedBy" equal to "iris@example.com".passed And the JSON payload should have field "status" equal to "PENDING"..........passed

testcase.name: Confirmation notification sent on booking confirmed event
testcase.system-out: Given the notification service is running...................................passed And the notification log is empty...........................................passed Given a "booking.confirmed" event is published with:........................passed When the notification service processes the event...........................passed Then a confirmation notification should be logged for "alice@example.com"...passed And the notification message should contain "Your booking BK-0001 for CR-101 on 2026-06-01 (09:00 - 10:00) is CONFIRMED".passed

testcase.name: Confirmation notification contains correct classroom and time details
testcase.system-out: Given the notification service is running...................................passed And the notification log is empty...........................................passed Given a "booking.confirmed" event is published with:........................passed When the notification service processes the event...........................passed Then a confirmation notification should be logged for "bob@example.com".....passed And the notification message should contain "CR-103"........................passed And the notification message should contain "14:00 - 16:00".................passed And the notification message should contain "2026-07-15"....................passed

testcase.name: Rejection notification sent on booking rejected event
testcase.system-out: Given the notification service is running...................................passed And the notification log is empty...........................................passed Given a "booking.rejected" event is published with:.........................passed When the notification service processes the event...........................passed Then a rejection notification should be logged for "carol@example.com"......passed And the notification message should contain "Your booking request for CR-102 on 2026-06-02 has been REJECTED".passed And the notification message should contain "Time slot is already booked"...passed

testcase.name: Rejection notification includes the reason for rejection
testcase.system-out: Given the notification service is running...................................passed And the notification log is empty...........................................passed Given a "booking.rejected" event is published with:.........................passed When the notification service processes the event...........................passed Then a rejection notification should be logged for "dave@example.com".......passed And the notification message should contain "Time slot is already booked"...passed

testcase.name: Multiple notifications sent for multiple events in sequence
testcase.system-out: Given the notification service is running...................................passed And the notification log is empty...........................................passed Given the following booking events are published:...........................passed When the notification service processes all events..........................passed Then "3" notifications should have been sent................................passed And a confirmation notification should be logged for "user1@example.com"....passed And a rejection notification should be logged for "user2@example.com".......passed And a confirmation notification should be logged for "user3@example.com"....passed

testcase.name: Duplicate event does not produce duplicate notification
testcase.system-out: Given the notification service is running...................................passed And the notification log is empty...........................................passed Given a "booking.confirmed" event is published with:........................passed And the same event is published again.......................................passed When the notification service processes both events.........................passed Then only "1" notification should have been sent for "BK-0020"..............passed
